vss.config.server.title: VSS Local Config
vss.config.server.note: Changes this local client/single-player integrated server only. Dedicated servers should use /vss or the server config file.
vss.config.server.remote_locked: Server settings are locked while connected to a dedicated server. Use /vss on the server instead.
vss.voxy_options.title: Voxy Server Side
vss.voxy_options.receive_server_lods.too: Download Voxy LOD data from the server.
vss.voxy_options.off_thread_processing.t: Process received LOD chunks on a background thread to reduce main-thread stutter.
vss.voxy_options.client_lod_distance.too: Limit how far this client asks the server for LODs. Auto uses the lower of the server limit and Voxy setting.
vss.voxy_options.desired_bandwidth.toolt: Ask the server to cap how much LOD data it sends you. The server cap still wins.
vss.voxy_options.server_sync.tooltip: Main VSS server switch. This only affects the single-player/integrated server; dedicated servers should use /vss or the server config file.
vss.voxy_options.far_player_sync.tooltip: Sync simplified far-away player rendering. This only affects the single-player/integrated server; dedicated servers should use /vss farplayers.
vss.voxy_options.far_player_sync_interva: How many ticks the single-player/integrated server waits between far-player syncs. Lower is fresher but sends more packets.
vss.voxy_options.generation.tooltip: When LOD data is missing, allow the single-player/integrated server to generate chunks and build LOD data. Dedicated servers should change this server-side.
vss.voxy_options.server_lod_distance.too: How far the single-player/integrated server may sync LODs to players. Dedicated servers should use /vss distance.
vss.voxy_options.server_bandwidth.toolti: Maximum shared server send speed for all players. Each client may still set a personal download limit.
vss.voxy_options.server_queue_count.tool: How many pending LOD chunks may be cached per player. Higher uses more memory; lower can create more gaps.
vss.voxy_options.server_queue_memory.too: How much pending LOD data may be cached per player. Higher uses more memory; lower can create more gaps.
vss.voxy_options.sync_near_rate.tooltip: How many already-generated LOD chunks each player may request per tick within 32 chunks. 0 means unlimited up to one request packet.
vss.voxy_options.sync_mid_rate.tooltip: How many already-generated LOD chunks each player may request per tick from 33 to 64 chunks away.
vss.voxy_options.sync_far_rate.tooltip: How many already-generated LOD chunks each player may request per tick from 65 to 128 chunks away.
vss.voxy_options.sync_distant_rate.toolt: How many already-generated LOD chunks each player may request per tick beyond 128 chunks.
vss.voxy_options.dirty_broadcast_interva: How often the server tells clients to refresh LODs after blocks are placed, broken, or changed by explosions. Lower values refresh faster and send more packets during large edits.
vss.voxy_options.disk_reader_threads.too: How many background threads VSS uses to read existing .vcl LOD files and chunk NBT from disk. Higher can reduce startup catch-up delay on SSDs.
vss.voxy_options.generation_player_concu: How many missing LOD chunks one player may ask the server to generate at the same time. Higher is faster but heavier.
vss.voxy_options.generation_global_concu: How many missing LOD chunks the whole server may generate at the same time. With C2ME installed, this can usually be raised; other background settings are assigned automatically from hardware performance.
vss.command.help.title: VSS commands:
vss.command.help.stats: /vss stats: show network, queues, cache, and server diagnostics.
vss.command.help.bandwidth: /vss bandwidth [get]: show shared total send bandwidth; set, set_bytes, set_kbps, set_mbps, and set_mib change it.
vss.command.help.queue: /vss queue [get]: show each player's send queue; set_count and set_mib change its column and memory limits.
vss.command.help.request_limits: /vss request_limits [get]: show existing-LOD request limits; set_near, set_mid, set_far, and set_distant set limits by distance.
vss.command.help.distance: /vss distance [get]: show the server LOD range; set changes it in chunks.
vss.command.help.far_players: /vss farplayers [get]: show far player rendering settings; enable, disable, and set_interval control it.
vss.command.help.dirty: /vss dirty [get]: show LOD refresh timing; set_interval changes the refresh interval in ticks.
vss.command.help.storage: /vss storage [get]: show LOD storage status; set_disk_readers changes disk reader threads.
vss.command.help.generation: /vss generation [get]: show missing-LOD generation; stats, enable, disable, set_player_concurrency, and set_global_concurrency control it.
vss.command.stats.details: %s online players, %s LOD chunks waiting to send, %s MiB cached; %s; %s
vss.command.stats.dirty: %s worlds pending refresh, %s LOD chunks pending refresh, %s worlds with remembered changes, %s remembered changed LOD chunks

vss.command.queue.saved: VSS send cache per player saved:
vss.command.queue.details: up to %s LOD chunks, %s memory cap

vss.command.dirty.details: notify clients every %s ticks after chunk changes; %s

vss.command.storage.runtime.extra: preload reads pending=%s; live reads=%s submitted/%s completed/%s rejected; preload reads=%s submitted/%s completed/%s rejected; read wait=%sms avg/%sms max
